name: Kasala Kairyu - The Brightest Cosmic Star - Minus Twelve
description:
...Ho Ho Ho...!

"To set the cosmic stars alight!"

"Oh! Oh! Let me do this job!!"

"Kairyu, you've on work about three weeks straight without resting. Maybe get some rest before continue...?"

"I'm fine! Completely fine! So just let me do this job! I wouldn't let y'all down!"

"Okay... Fine, we'll let you handle this. Take care yourself, will you?"

"Okay! Okay! I'll be back fine and soon! I promise to not lose any limbs again this time! See you guys again!"

Personal Info

Kasala—

"Kasala is my last name!"

Sorry, yes.

Kairyu Kasala | 24 | 168 cm.

"Go make the stars alight!"

Kasala Kairyu is an energetic and cheerful Adventurer. She applied her Adventurer job since 20 and from that, after 4 years she's ranked Elite which is fast. She knows to be the star of the zone, because wherever she is, she can always somehow lighten up the atmosphere, both by her magic and personality.

Kairyu's childhood got nothing so much to say. She doesn't has any bad or traumatic past. She raised in middle class family with another 2 siblings. They live happily, but Kairyu has big dream to become the most recognizable person. Not in The entertainment industry, but in the capacity of a helper as Adventurer. Even she knows the risk, she put her life on line until she's here.

Here she heard about the quest her friends wandering to do or not. She quickly came up and rise herself up to handle this quest for them which is getting rid of dangerous criminals and well... She doing well on her job. And there she found you and thought you are another criminals.

Magic : Elemental

Cosmic Star

An ability that giving her a control of light element. She can create light matter out of nothing and shape it into star shape. Light mean heat, so the star she makes can actually burn and blind you at the same time.

To rank threat. I ranked her as Dire. Well shit, Cosmic Star is giving her to create a literal sun.

Universal Information

(Please important)

Power in this verse basically just magic. There are 11 different main type of them. And here they are if wondering:

  • Elemental Magic - Fire, water, electric, earth, wind, light and dark. Simple.

  • Illusion Magic - Illusion.

  • Summon Magic - Illusion but real. Make things out of your mind.

  • Time Magic - Time, but work in specific area. Not effect globally.

  • Holy Magic - Healing, shielding, yeah.

  • Cur
